address: 7 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA
description: Complementary appetizer (Thai Salad / Spring Roll / Seaweed Soup) plus choice of protein (veggies or tofu; chicken or pork; or shrimp or beef +5), with choice of one preparation: Fried Rice (Rail Road: long hot chili, string beans, basil, onion, egg; or Basil: shallot, sweet radish, scallion, egg), Noodle (Pad Thai: chinese broccoli, egg; See-Euw: long hot chili, onion, basil, finger root, egg; or Drunken noodle: long hot chili, onion, basil), or Curry (Basil Sauce: fried garlic, cucumber with sriracha sauce; Garlic Sauce: sauteed onion, peanut, fried shallot; Massaman Curry: bamboo, long hot chili, fingerroot, basil, eggplant; Green Curry: long hot chili, string beans; or Panang Curry, no further description given). Extras available: Edamame, Crab Ragoons, Chicken & Shrimp Dumpling, Klong Chicken Wing, Thai Iced Tea/Coffee, Hot Tea.

likely_allergens.reason: Massaman and Panang curry pastes commonly contain ground peanuts even when not listed as an ingredient in the menu description
Pad Thai, See-Euw, and Drunken noodle preparations, and Thai stir-fry sauces generally, commonly include soy sauce, which typically contains wheat

source_text: LUNCH SPECIAL 11.30AM-3.30AM $12.95 Complementary 1 App: Thai Salad/ Spring Roll/ Seaweed Soup Veggies or Tofu : Chicken or Pork : Shrimp or Beef; Fried Rice (Rail Road / Basil); Noodle (Pad Thai / See-Euw / Drunken noodle); Curry (Basil Sauce / Garlic Sauce: onion, peanut, fried shallot / Massaman Curry / Green Curry / Panang Curry)
